title: speedgraphframes unclamped -> HUD/watch timers jump on frame spikes (M2.4)

history.note: Landed eab7804 (fix(timing): M2.4 clamp speedgraphframes at the assignment site, NATIVE_PORT-gated, RAMROM-playback exempt) — unk_0C0A70.c:262-265 mirrors lvl.c cap policy (1/4). NOT verified: clamp only fires on frame spikes (deltaFrames>4); no lane injects a synthetic spike and asserts HUD/watch timers stay bounded. Needs a frame-spike clamp lane.

Regression lane tests/test_speedgraph_clamp.c (ctest speedgraph_clamp) drives the pure frame_clamp.c TU mirroring lvl.c cap: spike 13->4, within-cap pass-through, first-tick->1, RAMROM playback preserves raw (overrides caps). Fail-on-revert proven: bypassing the clamp (return raw) makes 13->13 + first-tick 13->13, 4 checks red; restored->green. ge007 builds clean; sim_state_hash unchanged. Committed 0c161d7.
